title: Phase 3: real SWE-bench Lite evaluation with hard <$20 spend cap

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: Architecture decision: D (all-API). mini-swe-agent + gpt-5-mini as evolved solver + self-improve + diagnose. codex dropped. Reuses ALL Phase 2 code. Scoring via official swebench harness in Docker. BLOCKER: OPENAI_API_KEY unset (needed for live solve only; scoring validates $0 via gold patch). Headroom: decide after baseline.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: Scoring path VALIDATED $0 (gold patch -> resolved=True, official harness in Docker). Key mapped (OAI_KEY->OPENAI_API_KEY), .env gitignored. Model gpt-5.4 verified via litellm (cost-tracking works). Built real_backend (LitellmModel + Docker env factories) + live_smoke.py (Stage A: eval initial on 1 instance, $3/run + $20 global cap). 21/21 unit tests green. Live smoke running.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: LIVE SMOKE PASSED: initial agent (gpt-5.4) resolved astropy__astropy-12907 on SWE-bench Lite. resolved=True, spent=$0.0492. Full path LLM->patch->Docker tests->official harness works. Headroom flag is now concrete: strong model solved instance-0 on first try => may need to handicap base scaffold for HGM to show improvement. Remaining: Stage B = sandbox the live self-improve meta-agent, then run real HGM loop on a handful of instances.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: LIVE SELF-IMPROVE PASSED (Stage B). gpt-5.4 meta-agent, sandboxed in python:3.12-slim with variant dir bind-mounted at /work, rewrote the agent's OWN config.yaml prompts (added persistence/never-empty-patch/reproduce-before-fix workflow). agent.py left unchanged. Child v1 validated. spent=$0.0335. Containers: eval=swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.<id> (pinned, /testbed); self-improve=python:3.12-slim (-v variant:/work). Total live spend so far ~$0.08. Every HGM component now demonstrated live.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: Committed working codebase on branch reproduce-hgm (3ae664a) + loop experiment (0b23440); pre-commit ruff hook enforced. Launched handicapped live HGM loop: terse prompt + step_limit=12 base, 3 Lite instances, max_task_evals=6, $8 cap / $1 per-run, gpt-5.4. Running in background.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: Loop complete ($0.385). initial 0.33 (1/3); v1/v2/v3 each measured once on hardest instance -> 0.00; best-by-mean=initial. BUT all 3 children self-edited correctly: doubled step_limit 12->24 + expanded system prompt (undid the handicap). No measured lift = expected at 6-eval scale (no statistical power). Mechanism fully works; headline curve needs paper-scale eval budget. Wrote RESULTS.md.

title: Phase 2: integrate mini-swe-agent as real Evaluator + SelfImprover
close_reason: Done. File-based variants (prompts+config+code surface), dynamic agent-class loader, run_variant bridge, MiniSelfImprover (agent edits its own files). 17/17 tests $0. Integration test: HGMSearch drives real self-improvement producing on-disk variants.

comments.author: Charles Weill
comments.text: Built: AgentVariant + VariantStore (variant = mini-swe-agent config dict), run_variant() bridge. Validated full agent loop for $0 via DeterministicModel + LocalEnvironment (4/4 tests). Remaining: SelfImprover (config mutation) — pending mutation-surface decision; then Evaluator scoring seam (Phase 3).

title: Phase 1: core HGM search (tree, CMP, Thompson Sampling, expand/measure loop) vs simulated evaluator
close_reason: Done: 9/9 tests green; CMP +0.055 mean skill over greedy (peaks at intermediate drift). Liveness bug fixed.
